author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

COPA Returns - Guilds Get READY!

Star Atlas is excited to announce the third Council of Peace Assembly (COPA), a competition where Guilds/DACs present their vision, progress, and impact across the Galia ecosystem.

This is your DAC’s shot at earning a CSS Tier 3 and proving why you deserve to be recognized as the best in Galia.

What's next?
DACs submit a presentation based on the contest criteria,Presentation submissions close on July 17th,Top DACs will be announced July 21 and invited to present at COPA this summer (date TBD),
Learn more and view the grading criteria here: https://medium.com/star-atlas/the-third-council-of-peace-assembly-copa-is-coming-3faf985961fa

 | DAC leaders can submit their COPA presentation here: https://copa.staratlas.com/
